title: digitaria ciliaris var. pes-avis
intro: Digitaria ciliaris var. pes-avis, also known as Digitaria pes-avis, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is a plant traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa and Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Digitaria pes-avis include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Digitaria pes-avis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the plant in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the leaves and stems, and is used to treat various ailments.
